---
title: "The Child’s Christian Year: Hymns for every Sunday and Holyday, compiled for the Use of Parochial Schools"
---

## The Child’s Christian Year: Hymns for every Sunday and Holyday, compiled for the Use of Parochial Schools

**Author:** Frances Mary Yonge
**Date:** 1841
**Imprint:** Oxford: Parker

### Notes

An anthology, with a preface by Keble signed J. K..

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
